name: Luscious Lemon Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Butter a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Mix crushed graham crackers and cinnamon with melted butter; press into the bottom and up sides of the pan. Bake for 5 minutes, then cool.
4. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add sugar, beating well. Beat in eggs one at a time, then stir in lemon juice, lemon peel, and vanilla extract.
5. Pour filling into the crust and return to oven. Bake for about 40 minutes, maintaining the temperature at 350°F (175°C).
6. For topping: In a small bowl, mix sour cream, additional sugar, and vanilla extract. Spread over the cake.
7. Bake topping for 15 minutes until it sets slightly; let cool for 30 minutes.
8. For glaze: Whisk water, lemon juice, egg yolk, remaining sugar, cornstarch, salt, and butter in a saucepan until boiling. Cool slightly, then stir in lemon zest. Let stand for 20 minutes before spreading over the cake.
9. Allow the cake to cool completely before refrigerating until well chilled. Garnish with thinly sliced lemon peel; serve cold.
